methods.method_name: Bti Inactivation Experiment in Distilled Water
methods.description: This method investigates the effect of various factors such as larval stage, pH, liquid chlorine, water temperature, and ammonia nitrogen on the inactivation of Bti in distilled water.

steps.description: The experiment was firstly undertaken in distilled water solution.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare distilled water solution for experiment

steps.description: One liter beaker was used as the test reactor.
steps.searchable_summary: set up test reactor using one liter beaker

steps.description: The third larval stage organisms were transferred to each test jar with a glass pipette.
steps.searchable_summary: transfer third larval stage organisms to test jar

steps.description: Larva were regarded as dead if unable to make a sustained and coordinated response when grasped with a pair of fine forceps.
steps.searchable_summary: determine larval mortality based on response to forceps

steps.description: Mortality data were pooled and corrected against the mean control mortality using Abbott's formula.
steps.searchable_summary: correct mortality data using Abbott's formula

steps.description: Ammonium chloride and sodium hypochlorite were used to make up ammonia nitrogen and liquid chlorine of distilled water solutions.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare ammonia nitrogen and liquid chlorine solutions

steps.description: NaOH or H2SO4 were used to adjust pH of distilled water solutions.
steps.searchable_summary: adjust pH of solutions using NaOH or H2SO4

methods.method_name: Bti Inactivation Experiment in Raw and Prechlorination Coagulation Sedimentation Water
methods.description: This method studies the inactivation efficiency of Bti in actual raw water and prechlorination coagulation sedimentation water from the Shenzhen Water Treatment Plant.

steps.description: The inactivation efficiency of Bti was studied in the actual raw water and prechlorination coagulation sedimentation water taken from the Shenzhen Water Treatment Plant.
steps.searchable_summary: collect raw and prechlorination coagulation sedimentation water from Shenzhen WTP
